source_note: Order in the electronic examination of the Fuel Adjustment Clause (FAC) of Kentucky Power Company (AEP) for November 1, 2022 through April 30, 2023, Kentucky PSC Case No. 2024-00136, issued March 19, 2025. Listed for reference (metadata-only). PDF at psc.ky.gov/pscscf/2025 Cases/2025-00114/; case folder psc.ky.gov/Case/ViewCaseFilings/2025-00114.
